reviews.review_description:
i really like so many aspects of this game. when i am feeling brave, i can play the difficult level. when i am feeling nervous or agitated i can play the easy level which is task based.

i have had a lot of difficulty in different ways. for example how do i switch between the levels? of which the answer is go into the hub and select the screen for your difficulty level. 

okay and how about what are those five weird yellow things when i look down? oh those are holders for some of the one use bombs and such you can purchase in the hub. 

here are some things i dislike a lot: when i am in easy mode and grandpa is nowhere around but i hear him get angry and start chasing me. it seems like having certain items in the cart maybe set him off? 

what in the world are some of the objectives-- i can't figure it out . like i have to find a secret room and i need a code but i can't find a code and there are no helps. i have to break into his computer and i don't know i'm looking at the computer and the seven screens of horror or whatever and i guess that's not what they want me to do. one time my objective was to take three hats into my room and i literally had every hat i can find in the game and it just wouldn't acknowledge that. i have grandpa's favorite book and i have thrown it into a variety of trashes but none of those end the mission either. 

i don't really understand the point of having grandpa get angry at you especially in easy mode because there's no way to just get him to get over it. i mean other than using one of the power ups why not just say game over there and restart it? it's not like you can really get away from him especially if it is him blocking a portal matter. 

one thing that would be really useful would be to have objects that you've already collected appear transparent or something or to have undiscovered ones glow.

i don't like that grandpa can move my cart. i did have one level where he moved it while i was hiding and i was never able to find it. 

if you could create a 3rd mode that would be so cool. maybe one where you get to be his friend so he can tell you what to do or Get or make him etcetera. like hi i can't find my keys or make it like a scavenger hunt or something. 

at this present moment i am completely stuck with the missions because i can't find whatever secret room i can't throw out grandpa's book and i can't open his laptop or whatever. there are no real videos online to help. so all i can do is go collect random things from the house into my cart, try not to get caught, and deliver the carts to the portals. 

additionally it is very confusing what the grumpy secretary does in the hub. she talks about her precious artifacts and it doesn't make a lot of sense that you can't hand them to her but rather you leave it in your cart to feed into the machine.

An F every time?? i think that's supposed to be humorous by the developers but is not motivating.

i don't like that when i'm supposed to find the precious artifact sometimes i can't figure out what the heck it is. it should be able to be viewed in different perspectives or have a little more information about it. 

in easy mode i love the mission reminders but i would like that for the precious artifacts as well.

with this much frustration i'm not sure how much playability there really is for me. I keep coming back but i can't find more coherence to the clues so i'm stuck 😐 

another thing i do not like is the room dimming when you enter a new room. This has gotten me caught before by grandpa bc i couldn't see him as everything was gray as i transitioned between rooms but he was already seeing me. 

man i would love to be a beta tested for them!

my caRt got stuck IN the snowman upstairs by G's bedroom.

i need to say that the use of AI is so minimal. As an artist i love seeing all of the 3D objects they built. I see AI in the family photos primarily which are in frames. Brain rot toys are weird but fine. spider is bossy!!! loved the halloween edition and now the xmas. Beautiful scenes and lighting on the garlands!

developer_response.body:
Hi peace5777,

Thank you so much for such a detailed and thoughtful review — we truly appreciate the time you took to share your experience.

First of all, we apologize for the long reply. If this is still relevant for you, please feel free to contact us at info@dream-dev.com — we’ll be happy to guide you on how to complete specific missions and explain tricky mechanics.

You’ve raised many important points: mission clarity, objectives, Grandpa’s behavior, item interactions, and overall guidance. We understand how this can become frustrating, especially when you feel stuck. We’ll definitely review all of this with our team and look into ways to improve clarity, balance, and the overall experience.

Thank you again for your support and for coming back to the game despite the challenges.

Regards,
Horizon Lab

Update October 7
---

Hi yummyworks,

Thank you so much for updating your review! 

We’ve just released a big Halloween Update — full of spooky decorations and fun surprises. 🎃

And yes, this time it’s something truly unique — no copycats, just ghostly creativity! 👻😄

This update also includes a special Halloween bundle available for everyone — but hurry, it’s only here for the next 3 weeks! ⏰

Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_description: The game premise is great. The controls or just grabbing things is the most frustrating thing I have ever experienced..........I don't know if it's by design but wow. I had to turn off the game real quick.

developer_response.body:
Hi peskaai,

Thank you for your comment!

Could you please describe what problem you had with the controls or grabbing?

The controls are quite simple:

1. Left stick — move around. You move in the direction you look.

2. Right stick — turn.

3. Grab button — hold to pick up an item, release to drop it.

It works similarly to most other VR games.

Our team would really appreciate if you could describe the issue in more detail (a short video would help a lot). That way, we can improve the movement and grabbing systems in future updates.

You can reach us at info@dream-dev.com
.
Thank you very much!

Best regards,
Dream Dev Studio

reviews.review_description:
Awesome job to the devs! I love chaotic fun and this is exactly that! This is my second most played game, aside from thief simulator vr. I love how cute everything has been drawn and all of the fun little surprises. The interactions, missions, and goofy shenanigans is what I love VR for!!!

The devs are great with updates and feedback. It doesn't matter your age, you will LOVE this game! 10/10

reviews.review_title: Gives an in game item if you rate it 5/5
reviews.review_description:
The actual premise is AWSOME and the execution is great enough here’s the flaws; the gandpa is actually able to kill you and directly go after you, many missions aren’t properly explained, it’s sometimes very difficult to find gandpa and the game directly offers an in game item for giving it a five star review so you can’t trust the people giving it that (but after leaving a 3 star review I still got the weapon) but the actual gameplay is pretty fun (although when turning the mic on it seems like gandpa can actually see you and that was not great so I couldn’t play around that much with the voice functionality. 4/5 except for that sketchy move where they give you stuff for leaving a 5 star review

Edit: the new “Brainrot” update has completely ruined it for me and it should definitely be a setting

Edit 2: i find the “brainrot” SUPER annoying so an option to turn it off in the settings would be highly appreciated. In addition to that a setting to turn off grandpa becoming mad and chasing you would be nice

developer_response.body:
Hi TheDanishCat.9356,

Thanks so much for your detailed feedback — really appreciate it and glad you’re enjoying the core gameplay!

Just a heads-up about recent updates: we’ve added lots of new content like secret rooms, the Spy Room, and new interactive objects to give players even more freedom and fun ways to mess with Grandpa.

Regarding Brainrot: it’s designed as an extra, optional element to add chaos, but it’s not required at all. You can completely ignore those characters — they don’t affect your ability to play, progress, or complete any missions.

We hear you about difficulty, Grandpa’s behavior, and the mic detection — we’re continuously improving explanations and tweaking balance in upcoming patches.

Appreciate you sharing your thoughts — please keep them coming!

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_title: Find hidden clues  and solve missions
reviews.review_description:
A game for all ages, which you can play seated. 

It is a ‘search’ game with puzzles. 

There are easy missions, where you just have to do something (like search for 3 candles and put them in your room). Other missions are more difficult (like searching for a code to open a safe).

If you ever have ideas or suggestions, feel free to write us at info@dream-dev.com — we’d love to hear from you!

reviews.review_title: A Hilariously VR Gem That Keeps Evolving
reviews.review_description:
Everything about this game is clever — from the title “I Am Cat vs You Are Ghost” to its mischievous concept and the insanely consistent weekly updates.

Unlike Gorilla Tag, you don’t have to walk on your hands — a huge plus! Instead, you play as a ghost who can glide through walls, floors, and ceilings, causing all kinds of hilarious trouble for poor Grandpa.

There are tons of mini missions that unlock every corner of the house and let you wreak havoc:

    Wake up Grandpa in the worst ways

    Release dangerous animals

    Make him eat bizarre things

    Fight him in a ridiculous boxing match

Thanks to the developer’s commitment, I rediscover new content every single week — seriously, new updates drop weekly. It’s become an endless source of fun and content for my channel.

This is one of the most creative and active studios on the Meta Store, and honestly, it deserves a 6-star rating system just for that. If you enjoy chaotic fun, surprises, and pure creativity — this game is a must-have.

developer_response.body:
Hi metaquesta99,

Thank you so much for the detailed and thoughtful review!

We truly appreciate your kind words about the game’s concept, the weekly updates, and the variety of gameplay. It means a lot to hear that You Are Ghost has become a fun and creative experience for you — and even a source of content for your channel.

We’re committed to keeping the game fresh with regular updates and new ideas, so we’re glad to know that it’s making a difference for our players.

Thanks again for your support — and stay tuned, more surprises are on the way!

Best regards,
The You Are Ghost Team

reviews.review_description: You get to play as a ghost and scare an old man using your mic. When you yell at him, he falls down with funny animations. And if you really make him mad, he might even come at you with a fly swatter! It’s not too scary—just the right mix of creepy and silly. I totally recommend it; it’s fun and a little bit wild.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Legit.fpv! 👻

We’re so happy you’re enjoying the mix of spooky and silly — and yes, grandpa with a fly swatter is next-level hilarious! 😂

Don’t forget: we release new updates every single week with fresh features and new ways to cause ghostly mayhem.

So keep checking in — and if you’ve got wild ideas, send them our way at info@dream-dev.com!

reviews.review_description:
Good game. The movement mechanics could be improved.  I wish I could just  press the A and B button to go up and down.

Updated on 5-17-25

Changing my rating from a 4 to a 5.  Simply because of the quick developer response and confirmation that my wish will be part of a future update.  Thank you!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi, xman7. 

Thanks for the comment!

We actually have this option planned for one of the upcoming updates, and we really hope you'll consider updating your review to 5★ once it's added — it means a lot to us!

If you have any more ideas or suggestions for the game, we’d love to hear them at info@dream-dev.com.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Are you going to add more maps in the full release?-thanks and can i get the house renovation early and im going to test it and tell you what i think of it -from darcy and i love the game i created games on my own too and idk if i should publish one i do it as a hobby and i love it im really good too

developer_response.body:
Hi, forestall_idk. 

Thanks a lot for your message!

We’re actually planning to expand the house and add lots of cool stuff and new characters very soon — it’s already in our plans for the next updates!

And yes — if you’d like to get access earlier than everyone else, feel free to join our Discord:

https://discord.gg/R5ND2R8ZAX

We’ll add you to a special tester group where you can try out new features before public release and share your thoughts.

P.S. Super cool that you're making games too — keep it up!

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_title: Mid game but has a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: In my original review I said that the game felt like it was nearly 100% ai generated, however after after giving the game a second chance and reading their feedback to mine and other reviews I think that this game isn’t too bad and has a lot of potential, the people who work behind this game are clearly hardworking people with a good idea for a vr game

developer_response.body:
Hi sonbear213309,

Thanks for the feedback.

To clarify: yes, some graphic elements in the game were created using AI to speed up development. 

But it feels like your expectations for what AI can do are a bit too high.

 AI doesn't design gameplay, write code, build 3D models, animate characters, or even voice Grandpa — all of that is done manually by our team.

If you really want to lower your rating because of a few dozen AI-generated images, that's your choice — but please don’t say the whole game was made with AI. That’s simply not true and unfair to the people who spent months crafting the experience — and who continue to deliver free weekly updates with new content.

We hope you’ll consider updating your rating as the game continues to grow and improve with regular updates. 

And of course, if you have any ideas, feel free to share them with us at info@dream-dev.com.

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun i just love it and i will tell everybody i can about this game buy it !!!!

developer_response.body:
Hello AntonioBlack85!

We're thrilled you're having so much fun — and a huge thanks for spreading the word about the game! 🙌

We regularly release new updates with fresh content. 

Yesterday (June 19), we launched the Disco Party update with a brand-new music-filled room — hope you’ll check it out!

If you ever have ideas or feedback, drop us a line at info@dream-dev.com — we’re always listening!

reviews.review_description:
This is a fun game!
Play as a ghost, using your own voice to scare a guy in his home.
Pass through walls and ceilings to go from room to room, picking up objects and using them to your advantage, to scare the poor guy!
Linger too long though, and the guy turns into a demon and starts hunting you down!

You have tasks to complete along the way and you can also collect items for your own room.

Graphics are good on this and the sounds good too.
There’s a very short tutorial to start you off, and the you are off on your way to frightening fun!

Anything from squirting water, starting rockets and cars moving, throwing objects to turning on tv and music.

You can even wear various headgear.

It’s a very fun game and one for the whole family to enjoy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Bloodangel1068! 👻🎉

We're so happy you enjoyed the spooky chaos — from squirting water to demon grandpa hunts, sounds like you're making the most of your ghostly powers! 😄💀

And great news — we release weekly updates with new scares, tasks, items, and fun features, so there’s always something fresh to explore.

Thanks again for the kind words — and if you ever have ideas or spooky suggestions, drop us a line at info@dream-dev.com!

reviews.review_description: My kid and I can't stop playing you are ghost! It's such a hilarious and heartwarming experience - we laugh nonstop while sneaking around and scaring Grandpa. It's one of those rare games that brings us closer and lets us just have fun together. Thank you for making sometings so special!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, CoralHowlerMonkey4816! 🥹👻

We’re absolutely thrilled to hear that You Are Ghost has become a fun bonding experience for you and your kid — that means the world to us! 💖

We release new updates every week, packed with fresh features and surprises to keep the laughs (and scares!) coming — so be sure to check back often!

If you ever have fun ideas or feedback, we’d love to hear from you at info@dream-dev.com. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
A new fun way to play on your quest from Dream Dev Studio
Play as a ghost and cause absolute mischief to grandpa.
Early access but really plays well .
Love the cartoon style, it’s like watching a cartoon show on tv.
Early days yet for me but loads of potential.
Thanks devs.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, GizmoDemi! 👻📺

We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the cartoon style and ghostly mischief — and super glad it’s running smoothly for you even in Early Access!

There’s tons more coming — we release updates every single week with new features and surprises, so be sure to check back often!

Thanks again for the kind words — and if you’ve got any fun ideas, drop us a line at info@dream-dev.com!

reviews.review_description:
I didn’t think being dead would be this fun. This is funny, spooky, and just the right amount of chaotic. You literally float around scaring grandpa, messing with objects, tipping water on grandpa, moving his stuff around and causing general haunted mayhem.
Watching him freak out when you knock over a lamp or whisper with your own voice from the shadows is brill.  If you've ever wanted to haunt a house, this is your moment.

developer_response.body:
Thanks, Magicmerlin007! 👻🪄

We’re so glad you're enjoying life on the other side! Floating around, whispering from the shadows, and watching grandpa panic — it’s the ultimate ghostly chaos! 😄💡

And there’s even more haunted fun coming — we drop weekly updates with fresh features, scares, and surprises.

Keep haunting — and feel free to share your spooky ideas at info@dream-dev.com!

reviews.review_description: Good game

developer_response.body:
Hi Everett719!
Thanks a lot for the feedback — glad you enjoyed the game! 😊
We’re releasing updates often with fun new features, so be sure to check back regularly.
If you have any ideas for future updates, feel free to share them with us at info@dream-dev.com.

reviews.review_description: You are ghost is the funniest game ever! I was rolling on the floor laughing scaring Grandpa! 🤣🤣🤣 I made such a mess in the rooms too!! If you want a crazy good time, you HAVE to play this! Can’t wait for even more pranks! 🙃🤣

developer_response.body:
Hey Smitboss,

Thanks a ton for your awesome comment! 😂 We're so glad you had a blast haunting Grandpa — that’s exactly the kind of chaos we love to see!

And great news: we’re releasing new updates every week with even more hilarious tools and pranks. 

This week we added a Grow & Shrink Ray, Mega Plunger Launcher, Water Bazooka & Shock-o-Matic.

Hope you find a moment to check them out — and if you ever have ideas or suggestions, we’d love to hear them at info@dream-dev.com.

Stay spooky! 👻

Hi PricklyHammerhead534,
